sentences.target: On va au tribunal demain matin.

translations.fr: On va au tribunal demain matin.
translations.en: We're going to the courthouse tomorrow morning.
translations.es: Vamos al juzgado mañana por la mañana.
translations.de: Wir gehen morgen früh zum Gericht.
translations.ru: Мы идём в суд завтра утром.
translations.pt: Vamos ao tribunal amanhã de manhã.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים לבית המשפט מחר בבוקר.
translations.vi: Sáng mai chúng tôi đến tòa án.
translations.nl: We gaan morgenochtend naar de rechtbank.
translations.uk: Ми йдемо до суду завтра вранці.
translations.hi: हम कल सुबह अदालत जा रहे हैं.
translations.el: Πάμε στο δικαστήριο αύριο το πρωί.
translations.nb: Vi drar til tinghuset i morgen tidlig.
translations.id: Kami akan pergi ke pengadilan besok pagi.
translations.sv: Vi ska till tingshuset i morgon bitti.
translations.da: Vi skal i retten i morgen tidlig.
translations.ja: 明日の朝、裁判所に行きます。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun functioning as the subject (3rd person singular form, often meaning ‘we’ in spoken French).
Main verb ‘aller’ in present indicative, 3rd person singular; expresses motion.
Contraction of the preposition ‘à’ and the definite article ‘le’; introduces the destination/location.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘au’.
Temporal adverb modifying the verb phrase.
Temporal noun specifying part of the day; combines with ‘demain’ to form a time expression.

sentences.target: Elle travaille au tribunal depuis trois ans.
sentences.reading: /ɛl tʁa.vaj o tʁi.by.nal də.pɥi tʁwa zɑ̃/

translations.fr: Elle travaille au tribunal depuis trois ans.
translations.ipa: /ɛl tʁa.vaj o tʁi.by.nal də.pɥi tʁwa zɑ̃/
translations.en: She has worked at the courthouse for three years.
translations.es: Trabaja en el juzgado desde hace tres años.
translations.de: Sie arbeitet seit drei Jahren beim Gericht.
translations.it: Lavora al tribunale da tre anni.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在法院工作了三年了。
translations.yue: 佢喺法院工作咗三年喇。
translations.ru: Она работает в суде уже три года.
translations.pt: Ela trabalha no tribunal há três anos.
translations.he: היא עובדת בבית המשפט כבר שלוש שנים.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đã làm việc ở tòa án được ba năm.
translations.ar: هي تعمل في المحكمة منذ ثلاث سنوات.
translations.nl: Ze werkt al drie jaar bij de rechtbank.
translations.uk: Вона працює в суді вже три роки.
translations.hu: Már három éve a bíróságon dolgozik.
translations.hi: वह तीन साल से अदालत में काम कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona pracuje w sądzie od trzech lat.
translations.el: Εργάζεται στο δικαστήριο εδώ και τρία χρόνια.
translations.nb: Hun har jobbet i tinghuset i tre år.
translations.id: Dia sudah bekerja di pengadilan selama tiga tahun.
translations.sv: Hon har jobbat på tingshuset i tre år.
translations.ro: Lucrează la tribunal de trei ani.
translations.cs: U soudu pracuje už tři roky.
translations.da: Hun har arbejdet ved retten i tre år.
translations.fi: Hän on työskennellyt oikeustalossa jo kolme vuotta.
translations.ja: 彼女は裁判所で三年間働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun (3rd person singular feminine) serving as subject.
Main verb in present indicative, 3rd person singular.
Contraction ‘à’ + ‘le’; introduces the workplace/location.
Common noun (masculine singular); complement of the preposition ‘au’.
Preposition marking duration starting in the past and continuing to the present.
Cardinal numeral quantifying the following time noun.
Common noun (plural) expressing a measure of time; object of ‘depuis’ with the numeral.

translations.vi: Tòa án hôm nay đóng cửa.
translations.ja: 裁判所は今日は閉まっています。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) determining the noun ‘tribunal’.
Common noun (masculine singular); subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to a predicate.
Predicate adjective (past participle used adjectivally) agreeing with ‘tribunal’ in gender and number.
Temporal adverb modifying the copular clause.

sentences.target: J’attends devant le tribunal pour mon cousin.
sentences.reading: /ʒa.tɑ̃ də.vɑ̃ lə tʁi.by.nal puʁ mɔ̃ ku.zɛ̃/

translations.fr: J’attends devant le tribunal pour mon cousin.
translations.ipa: /ʒa.tɑ̃ də.vɑ̃ lə tʁi.by.nal puʁ mɔ̃ ku.zɛ̃/
translations.en: I'm waiting in front of the courthouse for my cousin.
translations.es: Estoy esperando a mi primo frente al juzgado.
translations.de: Ich warte vor dem Gericht auf meinen Cousin.
translations.it: Aspetto mio cugino davanti al tribunale.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在法院门口等我的表弟。
translations.yue: 我喺法院門口等我表弟。
translations.ru: Я жду своего двоюродного брата перед судом.
translations.pt: Estou esperando meu primo em frente ao tribunal.
translations.he: אני מחכה לבן דוד שלי מול בית המשפט.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi anh họ tôi trước tòa án.
translations.ar: أنا أنتظر ابن عمي أمام المحكمة.
translations.nl: Ik wacht voor de rechtbank op mijn neef.
translations.uk: Я чекаю перед судом на свого двоюродного брата.
translations.hu: A bíróság előtt várom az unokatestvéremet.
translations.hi: मैं अदालत के बाहर अपने चचेरे भाई का इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam przed sądem na mojego kuzyna.
translations.el: Περιμένω τον ξάδερφό μου έξω από το δικαστήριο.
translations.nb: Jeg venter foran tinghuset på fetteren min.
translations.id: Saya menunggu sepupu saya di depan pengadilan.
translations.sv: Jag väntar framför tingshuset på min kusin.
translations.ro: Îl aștept în fața tribunalului pe vărul meu.
translations.cs: Čekám před soudem na svého bratrance.
translations.da: Jeg venter foran retten på min fætter.
translations.ja: 裁判所の前でいとこを待っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic (elided before vowel-initial verb).
Main verb in present indicative, 1st person singular.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article determining ‘tribunal’.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘devant’.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/purpose complement.
Possessive determiner (masculine singular) modifying ‘cousin’.
Common noun (masculine singular); object of the preposition ‘pour’.

Elle travaille au tribunal depuis trois ans.
J’attends devant le tribunal pour mon cousin.

She has worked at the courthouse for three years.
I'm waiting in front of the courthouse for my cousin.
